creator: keith@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw
text:
Update to 0.2.5_1.

This port has been in Taiwan's outta-port collection for a while.
Please commit it, thanks.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	pyDict
#	pyDict/files
#	pyDict/files/md5
#	pyDict/files/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample
#	pyDict/patches
#	pyDict/patches/patch-aa
#	pyDict/pkg
#	pyDict/pkg/COMMENT
#	pyDict/pkg/DESCR
#	pyDict/pkg/PLIST
#	pyDict/pkg/MESSAGE
#	pyDict/Makefile
#
echo c - pyDict
mkdir -p pyDict > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - pyDict/files
mkdir -p pyDict/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - pyDict/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/files/md5 << 'END-of-pyDict/files/md5'
XMD5 (pyDict-0.2.5.1.tar.gz) = ec92b0ed24ee48e483b1d4ea3713c012
END-of-pyDict/files/md5
echo x - pyDict/files/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/files/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample << 'END-of-pyDict/files/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample'
Xstyle "default" {
X       fontset = "-adobe-helvetica-medium-r-normal--14-100-100-100-p-76-iso8859-1,\
X                  -*-medium-r-normal--14-*-*-*-*-*-big5-0"
X}
Xclass "GtkWidget" style "default"
X
END-of-pyDict/files/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample
echo c - pyDict/patches
mkdir -p pyDict/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - pyDict/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-pyDict/patches/patch-aa'
X--- dict.py.orig	Wed Oct  4 14:37:47 2000
X+++ dict.py	Wed Oct  4 15:03:58 2000
X@@ -252,7 +252,7 @@
X     def execute(self,word):	# English to Chinese
X 		# move self.index to top
X 		self.index = 0
X-		command = g_command + ' --after-context=20 "^' + word + '.*=.*$" ' + dict_path + lower(word[0]) + '.lib' + '|awk "NR < 19 "'
X+		command = g_command + ' -A 20 "^' + word + '.*=.*$" ' + dict_path + lower(word[0]) + '.lib' + '|awk "NR < 19 "'
X 		result_lines = os.popen(command,'r').readlines()
X 		#if result_lines:
X 		if result_lines:
X@@ -488,7 +488,7 @@
X 
X def console_e_dict(input=None):
X 	#set up g_command
X-	g_command = '/bin/grep --ignore-case'
X+	g_command = '/usr/bin/grep --ignore-case'
X 	if input == None:
X 		inp = raw_input('word:')
X 	else:
X@@ -532,7 +532,7 @@
X 
X def console_c_dict(input=None):
X 	#set up g_command
X-	g_command = '/bin/grep '
X+	g_command = '/usr/bin/grep '
X 	if input == None:
X 		inp = raw_input('word:')
X 	else:
X@@ -603,7 +603,7 @@
X 	print 'type -e to English-Chinese mode'
X 
X     # set up grep command
X-    g_command = '/bin/grep --ignore-case'
X+    g_command = '/usr/bin/grep --ignore-case'
X     dict_path = '/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/pyDict/'
X 
X     # check if there is an DISPLAY environment variable
END-of-pyDict/patches/patch-aa
echo c - pyDict/pkg
mkdir -p pyDict/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - pyDict/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-pyDict/pkg/COMMENT'
XA Chinese <-> English dictionary, under both console and X11
END-of-pyDict/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - pyDict/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-pyDict/pkg/DESCR'
XpyDict is a Chinese(Big5) <-> English dictionary, written in Python.
XIt can be used as a console app or X11 window(with -x option). The
Xdata is prepared by TurboLinux in simplified Chinese, then converted
Xto traditional Chinese by CLE(Chinese Linux Extension) team.
X
XAuthor: Daniel Gau <plateau@pagic.net>
END-of-pyDict/pkg/DESCR
echo x - pyDict/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-pyDict/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/pydict
Xlib/X11/pyDict/HELP
Xlib/X11/pyDict/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample
Xlib/X11/pyDict/a.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/b.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/c.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/d.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/dict.xpm
Xlib/X11/pyDict/e.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/f.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/g.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/h.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/i.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/j.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/k.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/l.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/m.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/n.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/o.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/p.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/q.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/r.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/s.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/t.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/u.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/v.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/w.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/x.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/y.lib
Xlib/X11/pyDict/yaba.xpm
Xlib/X11/pyDict/z.lib
Xshare/doc/pyDict/CHANGELOG
Xshare/doc/pyDict/COPYING
Xshare/doc/pyDict/README
X@dirrm lib/X11/pyDict
X@dirrm share/doc/pyDict
END-of-pyDict/pkg/PLIST
echo x - pyDict/pkg/MESSAGE
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/pkg/MESSAGE << 'END-of-pyDict/pkg/MESSAGE'
X
X---------------------------------------------------------
XIf you experience problems displaying Chinese, first make
Xsure that you have correct locale settings, then copy
X/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/pyDict/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample to
X~/.gtkrc.zh_TW.big5 and try again.
X---------------------------------------------------------
X
END-of-pyDict/pkg/MESSAGE
echo x - pyDict/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >pyDict/Makefile << 'END-of-pyDict/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	pyDict
X# Date created:		25 Oct 1999
X# Whom:			Jing-Tang Keith Jang <keith@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	pyDict
XPORTVERSION=	0.2.5
XPORTREVISION=	1
XCATEGORIES=	chinese
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://freebsd.sinica.edu.tw/pub/keith/
XDISTNAME=	pyDict-0.2.5.1
X
XMAINTAINER=	keith@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/include/pygtk/pygtk.h:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-gtk \
X		${X11BASE}/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType/bsmi00lp.ttf:${PORTSDIR}/chinese/arphicttf
X
XUSE_X_PREFIX=	yes
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/dict
XNO_BUILD=	yes
XSHAREMODE=	644
XDICTDIR=	${PREFIX}/lib/X11/pyDict
XDOCDIR=		${PREFIX}/share/doc/pyDict
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xdo-install:
X	@${MKDIR} ${DICTDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/[a-z].lib ${WRKSRC}/dict.xpm ${WRKSRC}/yaba.xpm ${WRKSRC}/HELP ${DICTDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${FILESDIR}/gtkrc.zh_TW.big5.sample ${DICTDIR}
X	@${MKDIR} ${DOCDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/CHANGELOG ${WRKSRC}/COPYING ${WRKSRC}/README ${DOCDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/dict.py ${PREFIX}/bin/pydict
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-pyDict/Makefile
exit
